summary: Tested 'Rivivi il rilascio' (Relive the release) feature. Fixed critical bug where loadCinematic function was incorrectly nested inside generateTrailer function. All backend tests pass (11/11). Frontend tests pass - cinematic overlay displays correctly with phase animations, close button works.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: loadCinematic function was incorrectly nested inside generateTrailer function in FilmDetail.jsx (line 281-299). Moved to be a separate function.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'Rivivi il rilascio' feature is fully working. The ReleaseCinematic component renders correctly in overlay mode on FilmDetail.jsx. Test user test_cinematic@test.com/test123 can be used for testing. Film ID feb22f83-6e60-4afa-b1f8-96373d58d59e (Le cronache di Spagna) is a good test case for released films.
rca_of_the_issue: The loadCinematic function was accidentally nested inside the generateTrailer function due to a code merge/edit error. This caused a ReferenceError when the FilmDetail component tried to call loadCinematic from the onClick handler of the 'Rivivi il rilascio' card. Fixed by moving loadCinematic to be a separate function at the component level.
